overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring a dimly lit, industrial crew quarters. The character moves through a small room with mixed green and red ambient lighting, interacts with a storage locker, and approaches an exit door.

scene_state.functional_zone: crew quarters main room with workstation

agents.ego_description: walking around the room examining the desk, chair, and surroundings while turning to survey the space

entered.detail: industrial metal desk with a brightly illuminated rectangular screen on top
office chair positioned in front of the desk
tall metal shelving with various items and equipment
industrial piping and conduits running along the ceiling
rectangular screen mounted on the wall above the desk

segments.scene_description: The character explores a compact, green-lit industrial room containing a workstation with a glowing screen, an office chair, and metal shelving units. The space features exposed ceiling pipes and utilitarian furnishings as the character walks around surveying the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage area with emergency red lighting

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from greenish-teal to red as character moves deeper into the quarters

agents.ego_description: walking toward the back of the quarters where red emergency lighting illuminates control panels and a tall storage locker

entered.detail: tall vertical metal locker with a single door
wall-mounted panels with buttons and indicator lights
room divider with horizontal wooden slats
signs and notices posted on the back wall
stacked crates and containers on the floor

segments.scene_description: Moving into a deeper section of the quarters, the lighting shifts dramatically to red, revealing wall-mounted control panels and a tall metal storage locker. The character approaches the locker while passing by a slatted room divider and stacked storage crates.

scene_state.functional_zone: locker area with medical bed and exit door

events.description: character opens the metal locker door to inspect the interior
character turns from the locker and walks toward the exit door at the end of the room

agents.ego_description: opening the storage locker to look inside, then proceeding toward the exit door at the far end of the corridor

entered.detail: small metal side table with items on top
bed or cot with orange bedding against the right wall
metal door with frame at the end of the room
electrical conduits and panels on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character interacts with the storage locker, opening its door to reveal the interior contents, then continues past a small medical bed toward an exit door at the far end of the red-lit corridor. The walls show exposed conduits and industrial fixtures as the character approaches the door.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial crew quarters that transitions from a green-hued workspace into a red-lit corridor. It begins by surveying a compact room filled with utilitarian furnishings, including a workstation with a glowing screen and metal shelving under exposed ceiling pipes. As the character moves deeper into the quarters, the lighting shifts dramatically to red, revealing wall-mounted control panels and stacked storage crates behind a slatted room divider. The scene then focuses on the character interacting with a tall metal storage locker before gliding past a small medical bed. Finally, the camera follows the character toward an exit door at the far end of the corridor, passing by walls lined with exposed conduits and industrial fixtures.
